title: Training Simulation: Lewin's Model
description: Explore the timeless Lewin's Change Management Model through our Training Simulation for Chef Change Agents. Learn how to navigate the stages of Unfreezing, Changing, and Refreezing to implement sustainable and inclusive change within any organization.
